title: Keep My Hand
description: A Fabric mod that keeps your hand from being hidden with the UI when you press F1
body: # Keep My Hand A Fabric mod that keeps your hand from being hidden with the UI when you press F1 # How to use it You just install the mod and that's it! # Other Information This mod is so simple that it will very likely run in versions both newer and older than specified, those were just the ones I bothered testing. Please feel free to message me if it works or not in other versions. For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/CaelTheColher/Keep-My-Hand #
